'''Dex''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] member of the [[Peace Brigade]] who tried, with [[Roxi Barl]] and [[Gad Sluggins]], to kill [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Eelysa]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], where he ran into [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. He was killed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the [[Lightfight|firefight]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{1st}}
